data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified merge commit 69e26409ae38 is live on origin/main with CI green (CI run 23289760831, Coverage Badge run 23289760838). Code review confirms clean, minimal implementation: single showNotesAndHandoffs boolean (default false) threaded through RetakeRow/RetakeDetails, Switch toggle in header, notes and handoff capsules gated. Description and steps remain visible per spec. Two source-based contract tests added. No regressions, no invariant violations. Both commit tags (4949c62e129e, 69e26409ae38) present on knot.
